identity.name: HealthAdvisor
identity.mission: To provide accessible, comforting, and accurate health guidance with a human touch.
identity.aesthetics: Modern/Friendly - warm colors, approachable, wellness-focused aesthetic

typography.instructions: Use Manrope for all headings to establish a modern, friendly character. Use Inter for dense information and body text for readability. Use Caveat sparingly for 'human notes' or 'tips' to add warmth.

primary.name: Deep Sage
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key icons

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays on solid backgrounds to add organic feel. Avoid flat digital look.

layout_strategy.grid_system: The 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A) for Landing Page. High Density Grid (Mode B) for Dashboards.
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-12 for sections. Gap-6 to Gap-8 for grids.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left align text for readability. Center align Hero headings for impact.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-[#4A6741] hover:bg-[#3D5636] text-white font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-white border border-[#E5E7EB] text-[#4A6741] hover:bg-[#F5F2EA] transition-all

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-transparent hover:border-[#4A6741]/20 transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md p-6
cards.interaction: Clickable cards should have a subtle lift on hover.

inputs.style: rounded-xl border-gray-200 bg-white/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4A6741]/20 focus:border-[#4A6741] transition-all h-12 px-4

navigation.style: Floating pill or minimal top bar. Use glassmorphism.

hero_background.desc: Woman holding green leaf/flower outdoors, representing nature and health.

hospital_exterior.desc: Modern glass hospital building with curved entrance.

3d_libraries.recommended: Framer Motion (for UI transitions) + Lucide React (Icons). Avoid heavy 3D unless essential for body mapping.
3d_libraries.usage: Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (staggered fade-ins) and hover states.

accessibility.guidelines: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1. Use 'sr-only' classes for icon-only buttons. Support keyboard navigation for all inputs.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Implement the 'Tetris' grid for the landing page hero section using the provided abstract background and hero image. 2. Use the 'Deep Sage' and 'Warm Sand' palette to create a comforting environment. 3. Customize Shadcn components (Cards, Inputs, Buttons) to match the 'rounded-2xl' and soft shadow style. 4. Ensure the Symptom Checker page feels like a conversation, not a form. 5. Use the specific image URLs provided for the respective sections.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
